title: Market & Submarket Analysis
subtitle: How to pick the right MSA, the right submarket, and the right corner
description: Location still wins in CRE, but 'good location' is a lagging indicator. This course teaches you to read leading indicators: population growth, job formation, path of development, absorption rates, and traffic counts. You'll apply the framework to Central Florida and your home market.
outcomes: Analyze demographics and job growth at the MSA and submarket level
Use absorption, vacancy, and rent trend data to time a market
Read traffic counts and daytime population for retail deals
Identify the 'path of growth' before prices reflect it
Build a one-page market brief for any submarket in 30 minutes
